nasb.text: So the priests and the Levites accepted the weighed out silver and gold and the utensils, to bring them to Jerusalem to the house of our God.

esv.text: So the priests and the Levites took over the weight of the silver and the gold and the vessels, to bring them to Jerusalem, to the house of our God.

cnv.text: 於是祭司和利未人把稱過了的金銀和器皿收下，帶到耶路撒冷我們　神的殿裡。

ccb.text: 于是，祭司和利未人接过这些称过的金银和器皿，要带去耶路撒冷我们上帝的殿里。
